description: Every Toodledo feature from the terminal, plus an offline SQLite mirror, GTD reviews, and rate-budget-aware sync that no other Toodledo tool has.

tools.name: account_get
tools.description: Get account info, including per-resource lastedit/lastdelete sync cursors and Pro status. Returns the Account.

tools.name: contexts_add
tools.description: Create a context. Required: name. Returns array of Context.

tools.name: contexts_delete
tools.description: Delete a context (its tasks become unassigned). Required: id.

tools.name: contexts_edit
tools.description: Rename a context. Required: id, name. Returns array of Context.

tools.name: contexts_list
tools.description: List all contexts in the account (GTD-style location/situation labels such as @home or @computer). Takes no parameters. Returns an array of contexts, each with id, name, and a private flag. Call this to resolve a context name to its id before filtering tasks by context.

tools.name: folders_add
tools.description: Create a folder. Required: name. Optional: private. Returns array of Folder.

tools.name: folders_delete
tools.description: Delete a folder (its tasks become unassigned). Required: id.

tools.name: folders_edit
tools.description: Edit/rename/archive a folder. Required: id. Optional: name, archived, private. Returns array of Folder.

tools.name: folders_list
tools.description: List all folders in the account (the top-level containers tasks are grouped into). Takes no parameters. Returns an array of folders, each with id, name, ord (sort order), and archived/private flags. Use this to map a folder name to its id before creating or filtering tasks.

tools.name: goals_add
tools.description: Create a goal. Required: name. Optional: level, contributes. Returns array of Goal.

params.name: contributes
params.description: Id of a higher-level goal this contributes to

tools.name: goals_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a goal by id. Required: id (the goal's numeric id, resolvable via goals_list). Returns the deleted goal's id on success. Irreversible; deleting a goal does not delete tasks that referenced it.

tools.name: goals_edit
tools.description: Edit a goal. Required: id. Optional: name, level, contributes (plus 1 more). Returns array of Goal.

params.name: contributes
params.description: Id of a higher-level goal this contributes to

tools.name: goals_list
tools.description: List all goals in the account (long/medium/short-term objectives tasks can contribute to). Takes no parameters. Returns an array of goals, each with id, name, level, contributes (parent goal id), note, and an archived flag. Use this to resolve a goal name to its id when assigning tasks to a goal.

tools.name: lists_add
tools.description: Create custom list(s). Pass a JSON array of list objects. Required: lists. Returns array of CustomList.

tools.name: lists_delete
tools.description: Delete custom list(s). Pass a JSON array of list ids. Required: lists.

tools.name: lists_deleted
tools.description: List custom-list ids deleted after a timestamp. Optional: after. Returns array of DeletedRef.

params.name: after
params.description: Only deletions after this GMT unix timestamp

tools.name: lists_edit
tools.description: Edit custom list(s). Pass a JSON array of list objects including id. Required: lists. Returns array of CustomList.

params.name: lists
params.description: JSON array of list objects with id

tools.name: lists_list
tools.description: List custom lists. Feeds the local mirror via sync. Returns array of CustomList.

tools.name: locations_add
tools.description: Create a location. Required: name. Optional: description, lat, lon. Returns array of Location.

tools.name: locations_delete
tools.description: Permanently delete a saved location by id. Required: id (the location's numeric id, resolvable via locations_list). Returns the deleted location's id on success. Irreversible; tasks that referenced the location keep their stored reference.

tools.name: locations_edit
tools.description: Edit a location. Required: id. Optional: name, description, lat (plus 1 more). Returns array of Location.

tools.name: locations_list
tools.description: List all saved locations in the account (named geo-points for location-based reminders). Takes no parameters. Returns an array of locations, each with id, name, description, lat, and lon. Use this to resolve a location name to its id before attaching it to a task.

tools.name: notes_add
tools.description: Create note(s). Pass a JSON array of note objects. Required: notes. Returns array of Note.

params.name: notes
params.description: JSON array of note objects, e.g. [{'title':'Idea','text':'...','folder':0}]

tools.name: notes_delete
tools.description: Delete note(s). Pass a JSON array of note ids. Required: notes.

params.name: notes
params.description: JSON array of note ids, e.g. [123,456]

tools.name: notes_deleted
tools.description: List note ids deleted after a timestamp. Optional: after. Returns array of DeletedRef.

params.name: after
params.description: Only deletions after this GMT unix timestamp

tools.name: notes_edit
tools.description: Edit note(s). Pass a JSON array of note objects including id. Required: notes. Returns array of Note.

params.name: notes
params.description: JSON array of note objects with id, e.g. [{'id':123,'text':'...'}]

tools.name: notes_list
tools.description: List notes. Feeds the local mirror via sync. Optional: after. Returns array of Note.

params.name: after
params.description: Only notes modified after this GMT unix timestamp

tools.name: outlines_add
tools.description: Create outline(s). Pass a JSON array of outline objects. Required: outlines. Returns array of Outline.

tools.name: outlines_delete
tools.description: Delete outline(s). Pass a JSON array of outline ids. Required: outlines.

tools.name: outlines_deleted
tools.description: List outline ids deleted after a timestamp. Optional: after. Returns array of DeletedRef.

params.name: after
params.description: Only deletions after this GMT unix timestamp

tools.name: outlines_edit
tools.description: Edit outline(s). Pass a JSON array of outline objects including id. Required: outlines. Returns array of Outline.

params.name: outlines
params.description: JSON array of outline objects with id

tools.name: outlines_list
tools.description: List outlines. Feeds the local mirror via sync. Returns array of Outline.

tools.name: tasks_deleted
tools.description: List task ids deleted after a timestamp (for mirror reconciliation). Optional: after. Returns array of DeletedRef.

params.name: after
params.description: Only deletions after this GMT unix timestamp

tools.name: tasks_list
tools.description: List tasks (incomplete by default). Feeds the local mirror via sync. Optional: comp, after, before (plus 3 more). Returns array of Task.

params.name: after
params.description: Only tasks modified after this GMT unix timestamp (incremental sync cursor)

params.name: before
params.description: Only tasks modified before this GMT unix timestamp

params.name: fields
params.description: Comma-separated optional task fields to include
